content_body: I cannot recommend this company and these cabins enough. We rented four cabins for a 3 day work retreat and everything was PERFECT. The views, the space, the decor -- all of it. When I arrived to what we'd determined would be our 'main cabin' for the weekend, Gary (owner) was one step ahead, getting a fire started for us inside. Throughout our stay, he checked on us regularly, ensuring we were happy campers. The cabins themselves are magnificent, but the service is not to be understated either. Such a wonderful experience all the way around. I miss it already!
title: Best Business Retreat in Blue Ridge, GA
